records.ety: [F. enrichir; pref. en- (L. in) + riche rich. See Rich.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Enriched (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Enriching.]

defs: To make rich with any kind of wealth; to render opulent; to increase the possessions of; as, to enrich the understanding with knowledge.
quotes: Seeing, Lord, your great mercy Us hath enriched so openly.

defs: To supply with ornament; to adorn; as, to enrich a ceiling by frescoes.
To make rich with manure; to fertilize; -- said of the soil; as, to enrich land by irrigation.
To supply with knowledge; to instruct; to store; -- said of the mind.
